pages.text: Every Friday after school, Daluxolo stands with his arms leaning over the front gate, waiting...

blocks.text: Every Friday after school, Daluxolo stands with his arms leaning over the front gate, waiting...

pages.text: Daaaaaaaalllllliiiiiiiiiiiii! His friends keep calling him to play ball with them at the dusty soccer field down the road but he keeps saying no. DDaaaali!

blocks.text: His friends keep calling him to play ball with them at the dusty soccer field down the road but he keeps saying no. DDaaaali!

pages.text: That’s because someone special is coming … every weekend Tata comes home.

blocks.text: That’s because someone special is coming … every weekend Tata comes home.

pages.text: He cranes his neck towards the main road, eagerly waiting to see the moment when Tata’s white VW Beetle turns into his street.

blocks.text: He cranes his neck towards the main road, eagerly waiting to see the moment when Tata’s white VW Beetle turns into his street.

pages.text: As soon as it turns the corner, Dali runs to the home car in so Tata’s he can car. drive the rest of the way Beep! Beeep!

blocks.text: As soon as it turns the corner, Dali runs to the home car in so Tata’s he can car. drive the rest of the way

pages.text: “Hello Dali my boy,” Tata yells with excitement, as he opens the door. “Hop in!”

blocks.text: “Hello Dali my boy,” Tata yells with excitement, as he opens the door. “Hop in!”

pages.text: When Tata is home, he and Dali always have so much fun together, starting with their favourite meal cooked by Mama – pap, wors and gravy.

blocks.text: When Tata is home, he and Dali always have so much fun together,
starting with their favourite meal cooked by Mama – pap, wors and gravy.

pages.text: On Saturday morning, they start their day with a short jog around the neighbourhood.

blocks.text: On Saturday morning, they start their day with a short jog around the neighbourhood.

pages.text: Then after lunch, Tata teaches Dali how to play card games.

blocks.text: Then after lunch, Tata teaches Dali how to play card games.

pages.text: In the afternoon, Dali loves watching Tata polish his shoes while whistling to his favourite songs on the radio.

blocks.text: In the afternoon, Dali loves watching Tata polish his shoes while whistling to his favourite songs on the radio.

pages.text: Sunday is the saddest day when they have to say goodbye because Tata must go back to work.

blocks.text: Sunday is the saddest day when they have to say goodbye because Tata must go back to work.

pages.text: But Dali does not stay sad for long because he knows that on Friday, Tata comes home.

blocks.text: But Dali does not stay sad for long because he knows that on Friday, Tata comes home.
